summary: No candidate findings. The hygiene slice appears internally consistent on the reviewed focus areas: the pr_merge_readiness helper extraction keeps the same blocker/state flow, the raw-output missing-hash branch now emits the precise external_review_invocation_missing_raw_output_hash blocker instead of a raw hash mismatch, and the regression test covers that path with a real raw artifact and an invocation missing raw_output_hash. review_packet_path is consistently treated as a homogeneous-dual envelope field in both artifact preparation and review validation, while reviewer report context validation still binds each report to its assigned packet path.
self_declared_limitations: Read-only review only; I did not run tests, validators, scripts, package managers, network commands, or mutate git state.
Focused on the v18 hygiene slice and its referenced packet, prompt, schema, and repository artifacts; I did not re-review the full pr-merge-readiness feature surface.
